seo.title: Jericho's Exclusives Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Get your blood pumping with the Half & Half Jericho's Exclusives. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Creator of Morning Meltdown 100 and co-creator of the MMA program CORE DE FORCE®, Jericho is an NASM and ACE certified personal trainer who has coached thousands of people all over the globe. Now she brings her world-class expertise to BODi to help you elevate your training and reach your goals faster than ever.

data.descriptionShort: Jericho McMatthews helps you gain endurance and burn fat with these routines.
data.descriptionLong: Get your blood pumping with the Half & Half exclusive workouts. The first half, you’ll get high-intensity cardio training. The second half you’ll improve flexibility and balance with athletic yoga.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Creator of Morning Meltdown 100 and co-creator of the MMA program CORE DE FORCE®, Jericho is an NASM and ACE certified personal trainer who has coached thousands of people all over the globe. Now she brings her world-class expertise to BODi to help you elevate your training and reach your goals faster than ever.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQlGem.title: Jericho McMathews Exclusive 2021 Summit Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQlGem.descriptionLong: You’ll draw from a variety of mixed martial arts (MMA) disciplines in this intense, core-shredding cardio workout. Keep your guard up and your abs tight as you punch, kick, and block your way to a fighting-fit body.

trainers.bio: Jericho McMatthews’ passionate approach to fitness empowers you to own your health, wellness, and happiness. She’s a NASM and ACE certified personal trainer and holds degrees in psychology as well as physical education and kinesiology.
